_comment: Generic fixture exercising the typed node model: a nodeType 'round' whose layout renders an objective (Prose), a meta table (KeyValue), and a 'Rubrics measured' Section listing rubric objects as Tiles. Used by interview-map.test.tsx to prove rubrics resolve as Tiles (not 'Unknown') through the real app pipeline. Content is illustrative only.

meta.title: Generic Review Loop
meta.subtitle: signal-based rounds
meta.context: Each round measures specific signals against a 1-4 rubric.

context.objective: A warm-up round that establishes context and scope before the deeper rounds begin.

rubrics.name: Clarity of thought
rubrics.tomorrow: L4 structures an ambiguous prompt into a clear plan

rubrics.name: Curiosity
rubrics.tomorrow: L4 asks sharp clarifying questions early

context.objective: A problem that starts simple and gains constraints as you go, watching how reasoning holds up under load.

meta.label: Scope
meta.value: Layered: each layer adds a constraint.

rubrics.name: Systems thinking
rubrics.tomorrow: L4 reasons API to backend to DB and what breaks under load

rubrics.name: Problem decomposition
rubrics.tomorrow: L4 breaks the problem into parts before coding

rubrics.name: Debugging
rubrics.tomorrow: L4 isolates and reasons about failures methodically
